title: ophrys bertolonii subsp. catalaunica
intro: Ophrys bertolonii subsp. catalaunica is a subspecies of orchid, also known as the Catalonian bee orchid, found in the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is said to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in wound healing and skin care. The health benefits of Ophrys bertolonii subsp. catalaunica include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to promote skin regeneration and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in topical creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
